style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A large rounded boundary labelled CANADA contains two boxes: CONTROLLED CLOUD captioned ENTERPRISE AGREEMENTS, GUARDRAILS, and ON-PREM CLUSTER, OFFLINE captioned PROTECTED C. Inside the boundary, a small flag-like motif labelled SOVEREIGN COMPUTE with a caption GROWING. Outside the boundary on the right, a box labelled US INFERENCE connects into the CANADA boundary by a dashed arrow labelled SOME WORKLOADS TODAY. Along the bottom edge, a row of four small chips labelled UNCLASSIFIED, PROTECTED A, PROTECTED B, PROTECTED C, with a small bracket under PROTECTED B reading AROUND 99 PERCENT AT MOST. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
